hotspots.title: Cell Nucleus
hotspots.description: The deeply staining central hub containing the genetic material of the cell.

hotspots.title: Mitochondrion
hotspots.description: Rod-shaped organelle responsible for generating adenosine triphosphate (ATP).

hotspots.title: Cell Membrane
hotspots.description: The semi-permeable lipid bilayer surrounding the entire cytoplasm.

hotspots.title: Lysosome
hotspots.description: An organelle containing digestive enzymes responsible for waste degradation.
